title: Fix Image Stretching and Text Alignment in Help Popout
story: As a DataTools Pro user viewing help content, I want images to display at their correct proportions and text to be left-aligned, so that the help popout is readable and professional.
description:
Two styling issues in the help popout window:
1. **Image stretching**: Images loaded in the help popout stretch beyond their natural dimensions
2. **Text alignment**: Text content is not left-aligned

## Fix
Apply CSS to constrain image sizing (`max-width: 100%`, `height: auto`) and left-align text content in the help popout.
acceptance_criteria: Images in the help popout display at correct proportions without stretching
Text content in the help popout is left-aligned
Help content remains readable and properly formatted
ux_changes: Fixed image stretching in help popout with CSS max-width constraint. Text content left-aligned.
implementation_notes: Product owner fixed the icon sizing issue directly. Developer applied global alignment style for left-aligned text. Alternative approach via WordPress styling was discussed as a fallback.
comment_summary: Product owner fixed the image sizing directly. Developer confirmed text alignment fix working on staging.
